form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind Live And Free at Richmond last start over 320m (18.80). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when second behind Live And Free at Richmond last start over 320m (18.80). Gets back so might need a bit of luck.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 10 over 350m at this track behind Dream Linkin beaten 7 lengths (20.70) in a Grade 5. Should be right in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 10 over 350m at this track behind Dream Linkin beaten 7 lengths (20.70) in a Grade 5. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Back from a five months spell and last resumed over 450m at Ballarat where he was in the placings, finishing third. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Back from a five months spell and last resumed over 450m at Ballarat where he was in the placings, finishing third. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Having his first run at Goulburn. Comes off an average run last start over 330m at Temora when eighth behind Slick Silas (19.56) in Grade 5. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having his first run at Goulburn. Comes off an average run last start over 330m at Temora when eighth behind Slick Silas (19.56) in Grade 5. Doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels in the turn out of the back straight and fell.
Was galloped on 1st turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Nowra to win by 0.8 lengths in 21.02, beating Majestic Pearl. Last start finished 6th over 365m at Nowra beaten 11 lengths (21.54) behind Dark Cinnamon in a Grade 5 on April 9. Hard to envisage a win.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped off heels in the turn out of the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has recorded back to back wins. Scored most recently over 318m at Dubbo in Grade 5 class three weeks ago. In form but prefer to watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has recorded back to back wins. Scored most recently over 318m at Dubbo in Grade 5 class three weeks ago. In form but prefer to watch this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was checked on the home turn and came together with the running rail.
Checked off heels on the home turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Good performance to win by 4 lengths at this track over 350m (20.41) beating Tropical Ethics in Maiden on April 10. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by 4 lengths at this track over 350m (20.41) beating Tropical Ethics in Maiden on April 10. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the first turn.
Came together and fell rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won easily by 7 lengths at this track (20.64) beating Regis Krystal in a Maiden on March 27. Will find this much tougher but she's got good box manners and speed. Looks to be back in fine fettle. Makes plenty of appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Showed good early speed on debut. Won easily by 7 lengths at this track (20.64) beating Regis Krystal in a Maiden on March 27. Will find this much tougher but she's got good box manners and speed. Looks to be back in fine fettle. Makes plenty of appeal.

form.formComment: Surprised on debut at Temora to win by 2 lengths in 19.00, beating Nangar County. Last start finished last on April 8 over 330m at Temora behind Paw Hart beaten 16 lengths (19.91) in a Grade 5. Comes through a good form race. Looks a definite chance.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (19.11) over 330m at Temora. Can measure up.
